preference_text: Risk-averse memory profile: strongly avoids recent disputes, refunds, or failures on high-volume document work; requires verified agents and reliable SLA delivery.
Budget-focused memory profile: accepts minor delivery risk and prefers a lower-cost option when the evidence is adequate.
SLA-critical memory profile: uses verified agents and prioritizes reliable, recent delivery evidence over price.
Balanced memory profile: trades cost against reliable, task-specific evidence.
